subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who migrated with God until he entered into the Most Great Prison—this exalted station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی هاجر مع الله الی ان دخل فی السجن الاعظم هذا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others
